scripts.build: pnpm --filter @relaydock/protocol build && pnpm --filter @relaydock/config build && pnpm --filter @relaydock/shared build && pnpm --filter @relaydock/server build && pnpm --filter @relaydock/web build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @relaydock/protocol build && pnpm --filter @relaydock/config build && pnpm --filter @relaydock/shared build && pnpm --parallel --filter @relaydock/server --filter @relaydock/web dev
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @relaydock/protocol test && pnpm --filter @relaydock/shared test && pnpm --filter @relaydock/server test && pnpm --filter @relaydock/web test && pnpm test:agent
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @relaydock/protocol typecheck && pnpm --filter @relaydock/config typecheck && pnpm --filter @relaydock/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @relaydock/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @relaydock/web typecheck
